label: Rebel Starfighter
prompt_fragments: angular matte grey hull panels
twin rear thruster pods with glowing orange exhaust rings
swept-back delta wings with battle damage along leading edges
scorched heat shields below the nose
opaque dark cockpit canopy
hull number stencilled on the fuselage

label: Imperial Dreadnought
prompt_fragments: slab-sided matte charcoal hull
rows of gun batteries along the flanks
sensor towers rising from the dorsal surface
hull division lines scoring the plating
no chrome or reflective surfaces

label: Goblin War Barge
prompt_fragments: mismatched salvage planking with asymmetric patched hull
iron spike prow ram at the bow
ragged torn canvas sails
dangling lanterns swinging from the rigging
crude iron fittings and exposed rope lashings

label: Steampunk Ironclad
prompt_fragments: black-painted iron hull with riveted plates throughout
two rotating gun turrets fore and aft
brass pressure relief valves along the hull sides
smoke stacks venting dark exhaust
shallow-draft flat-bottomed hull form

label: Hover APC
prompt_fragments: flat-topped matte olive hull
grav-plate emitters on the flat undercarriage
side troop hatches along both flanks
sensor cluster mounted on the roof
no chrome or reflective surfaces

label: Ornithopter
prompt_fragments: articulated brass wing-frames with fabric membrane panels
open cockpit with exposed pilot seat
twin engine pods flanking the fuselage
riveted metal fuselage with visible bolt heads
mechanical linkage rods connecting wing joints

label: Xianxia Cloud Boat
prompt_fragments: carved red lacquer hull with gold script inlay
curved upswept prow with jade phoenix carving
trailing spirit-energy wisps streaming from the stern
cloud-platform base with levitation glow at the underside
ornate wooden railings with golden filigree trim

label: Attack Helicopter
prompt_fragments: matte olive drab airframe with national markings
stub wings with weapon pylons on each side
sensor pod mounted under the nose
opaque dark canopy over tandem cockpit
tail rotor and stabiliser fin at the rear

label: Gothic Funeral Hearse-Coach
prompt_fragments: matte black weathered-timber coachwork, slab-sided hearse body with cracked peeling finish
opaque dark glass casket-viewing panels along both sides
wrought-iron filigree cresting with funerary-urn finials along the roofline
tarnished-silver corner lanterns and a raised driver's box with worn leather seat
tall iron-shod spoked wheels with weathered timber spokes
empty harness shafts extending forward from the bow, deep-crimson moth-eaten velvet drapes behind the panels
